notes: Solid Tetris implementation with bag randomizer, hold, ghost piece, DAS/ARR, and hard drop, but the UI panel is cramped at x=330 on a 500px canvas with the well taking 300px, soft drop fires every frame without rate limiting causing too-fast descent, and wall kicks are minimal (no full SRS).
An excellent, fully-featured Tetris clone with 7-bag randomization, ghost piece, hold queue, and proper DAS/ARR implementation.

Core Tetris is present with spawn/lock/clear/next/hold/ghost, but rotation and hold lack proper validation and timing/input handling is rough, so it is playable yet clearly not polished or fully correct.
